a method of BT
rectification in the period of Satyacharya-Mihira etc, and prior
to that in the period of sages such as Skanda-Vasishta-Kausika
Parasara etc. then, was one of them Kunda multiplication
method? Usually astrologers do not seem to be aware ofthe
answer to this question.
The above two points such as -
1) Kunda method can correct only 2 min 57.5 sec = 3 min
max.
2) The sage support for Kunda method seems to be doubtful.
- can be considered as demerits of Kunda multiplication
method. But at least the second demerit we ascribe to Kunda

~B~ir~ffi~n~·m~e~R~e~c~ti=fi~ca~t=io~n~At~et~h~od~s,· _______________________5 5
method is baseless, as will become clear form further
discussion.
Since ultimately we would have to depend on Kunda
multiplication method ofBT rectification, let us rethink about
the history of this method.
Origin of Kunda multiplication method
From where, from which book, at which period, Kunda
multiplication method originated? Do sages support it?
